en: A PSALM OF DAVID.I will sing of steadfast love and justice; to you, O LORD, I will make music.
zh: 我要歌唱慈愛和公正； 耶和華啊！我要向你歌頌。

en: I will ponder the way that is blameless. Oh when will you come to me? I will walk with integrity of heart within my house;
zh: 我要小心謹慎行正直的路； 你甚麼時候才到我這裡來呢？ 我要在我的家中，以正直的心行事。

en: I will not set before my eyes anything that is worthless. I hate the work of those who fall away; it shall not cling to me.
zh: 邪惡的事，我都不擺在眼前； 離開正路的人所作的事，我都恨惡， 決不容這些沾染我。

en: A perverse heart shall be far from me; I will know nothing of evil.
zh: 狡詐的心思，我要遠離； 邪惡的事，我不參與。

en: Whoever slanders his neighbor secretly I will destroy. Whoever has a haughty look and an arrogant heart I will not endure.
zh: 暗中誹謗鄰舍的，我必把他滅絕； 眼目高傲，心裡驕橫的， 我必不容忍他。

en: I will look with favor on the faithful in the land, that they may dwell with me; he who walks in the way that is blameless shall minister to me.
zh: 我的眼目必看顧國中的誠實人， 使他們與我同住； 行為正直的， 必要侍候我。

en: No one who practices deceit shall dwell in my house; no one who utters lies shall continue before my eyes.
zh: 行詭詐的，必不得住在我的家裡； 說謊話的，必不能在我眼前堅立。

en: Morning by morning I will destroy all the wicked in the land, cutting off all the evildoers from the city of the LORD.
zh: 我每日早晨必滅絕國中所有的惡人， 好把所有作孽的人都從耶和華的城裡剪除。
